title: Lists: ul, ol, dl
description: Bullet lists, ordered lists, and description lists.

questions.prompt: Order of steps in a recipe → which list is best?
questions.explanation: Ordered list — the sequence carries meaning.
Two top-level <li>s (Apples, Bananas) and two nested (Yellow, Green).

questions.prompt: Make this into a proper unordered list.
questions.explanation: Wrap items in <ul>, use <li> for each.

questions.prompt: To START an ordered list at 5 instead of 1:
questions.explanation: <ol start="5"> — also reversed for descending numbering.
type on <ol>: 1, A, a, I, i for different marker styles.

options: The total number of items and iterating each
questions.explanation: e.g. 'List, 3 items'. Semantic lists help navigation.

questions.prompt: To reverse the numbers of an ordered list:
questions.explanation: <ol reversed> counts down from the start value.
